title: antirrhinum majus var. intermedium
intro: Antirrhinum majus var. intermedium, also known as the Common Snapdragon or Intermediate Snapdragon, is a perennial plant belonging to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus var. intermedium include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Antirrhinum majus var. intermedium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments.
